info.title: NeuronSearchLab Core API
info.description: Versioned data-plane API for OAuth token exchange, catalog item ingestion, user event ingestion, and recommendation serving.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: Catalog item ingestion, lookup, update, deletion, and pagination.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: User interaction event ingestion, lookup, and pagination.

tags.name: Recommendations
tags.description: Personalized recommendation serving, request-scoped filtering, and auto-section generation.

tags.name: CORS
tags.description: Browser preflight routes generated by API Gateway.

post.description: Exchange SDK client credentials for a short-lived Bearer access token. Use HTTP Basic authentication with `client_id:client_secret`.

get.description: List catalog items for the authenticated tenant using cursor-style pagination. Items are ordered by `entity_id` ascending.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by `metadata.category`.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Return items created at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Return items created at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.

post.description: Create one or more catalog items. When `id` is omitted, the API generates an `itm_` prefixed ID. Single-item requests return an item; array requests return a list envelope.

200.description: Created item or created item list

options.description: Preflight response generated by API Gateway.

get.description: Retrieve one catalog item by its public `itm_` ID.

post.description: Partially update an existing catalog item. `PATCH /v1/items/{item_id}` is also available as a compatibility alias.

patch.description: Compatibility alias for partially updating an existing catalog item. It accepts the same body and returns the same response as `POST /v1/items/{item_id}`.

delete.description: Delete a catalog item by its public `itm_` ID. The operation is idempotent at the response level and returns `deletedCount: 0` when no item matched.

options.description: Preflight response generated by API Gateway.

get.description: List ingested user events for the authenticated tenant using cursor-style pagination. Events are ordered by internal event ID ascending.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter to events recorded for one end-user ID.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter to one event type, such as `click` or `purchase`.

post.description: Submit one or more user interaction events. The API accepts snake_case and camelCase aliases for common fields. The event type is tenant-configured and can be provided as `type`, `event_type`, `eventType`, `event_id`, or `eventId`.

options.description: Preflight response generated by API Gateway.

get.description: Retrieve one ingested event by its public `evt_` ID.

options.description: Preflight response generated by API Gateway.

get.description: Retrieve personalized recommendations. Requests can be narrowed with context IDs, request-scoped metadata filters, cursor pagination, and auto-section parameters.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Optional stable request ID for retries and downstream event attribution. The same ID is returned in the response body and `X-Request-Id` response header.

parameters.name: X-Session-Id
parameters.description: Optional session identifier stored with served-recommendation telemetry.

parameters.name: X-Anonymous-Id
parameters.description: Optional anonymous identifier stored with served-recommendation telemetry when `user_id` is absent.

parameters.name: X-SDK
parameters.description: Optional SDK name stored with served-recommendation telemetry.

parameters.name: X-SDK-Version
parameters.description: Optional SDK version stored with served-recommendation telemetry.

parameters.name: X-Platform
parameters.description: Optional client platform stored with served-recommendation telemetry.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: End-user identifier to personalize for. When omitted, the API falls back to the token subject.

parameters.name: context_id
parameters.description: Numeric console context ID. Legacy ctx_ aliases such as ctx_101 are also accepted.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Legacy alias for `limit`.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor from the previous page. Accepts a recommendation ID, item ID, or raw item entity ID.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Entity type for personalization. Defaults to `User`.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional display name override for the request entity.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description override for the request entity.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Recommendation serving mode. `auto` chooses the next section from recent user activity and returns an auto cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Auto-mode cursor returned by a previous response.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Auto-mode activity lookback window in days. Defaults to 14.

parameters.name: candidate_limit
parameters.description: Auto-mode maximum number of recent activity anchors to evaluate. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: served_cap
parameters.description: Auto-mode maximum number of served section keys retained in the cursor. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: JSON-encoded request scope. Today only `filters` is honored, using objects with `column`, `operator`, `value`, and optional `logic`.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Metadata filter shorthand. Repeat the parameter to combine multiple filters. Examples: `category:electronics`, `type!=comment`, `OR:brand:Acme`.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Alias for repeated `filter` query parameters.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Optional stable request ID. Prefer the `X-Request-Id` header when possible.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: CamelCase alias for `request_id`.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: Optional session identifier. Prefer the `X-Session-Id` header when possible.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: CamelCase alias for `session_id`.

parameters.name: anonymous_id
parameters.description: Optional anonymous identifier. Prefer the `X-Anonymous-Id` header when possible.

parameters.name: anonymousId
parameters.description: CamelCase alias for `anonymous_id`.

X-Request-Id.description: Stable request ID for attribution and retry correlation.

options.description: Preflight response generated by API Gateway.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using `client_id:client_secret` for token exchange.

scopes.neuronsearchlab-api/write: Create, update, and delete items; submit events.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of resources to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 100.

RecommendationLimit.name: limit
RecommendationLimit.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 100.

ItemStartingAfter.name: starting_after
ItemStartingAfter.description: Cursor from a previous item list response.

EventStartingAfter.name: starting_after
EventStartingAfter.description: Cursor from a previous event list response.

OAuthError400.description: Unsupported grant type or malformed token request

scope.description: Space-delimited OAuth scopes. Omit to use the scopes configured for the client.

access_token.description: Bearer token to send in the `Authorization` header.

id.description: Optional public item ID. If omitted, the API generates one.

ItemUpdate.description: Partial item update. At least one field must be supplied.

active.description: Whether the item is eligible for recommendations.

EventCreate.description: At least one user ID alias, one item ID alias, and one event type alias are required. Type-specific payloads are accepted as additional object properties named after the event type.

eventId.description: CamelCase legacy alias for event type.

request_id.description: Recommendation request ID to attribute this event to.

context_id.description: Optional context identifier for analytics and attribution. Use the same context ID convention as the recommendation request.

placement.description: Surface or placement where the event happened.

occurred_at.description: Event occurrence timestamp. Numeric values below 1e12 are interpreted as Unix seconds.

entity_id.description: Raw item entity ID from the candidate source.

group.description: Group key built from the active context `group_by` fields.

default_reason.description: Reason the default embedding was used, for example `no_db_embedding`.

Metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON object used for filtering, ranking, and debugging.

explanation.summary: Ranked by vector similarity to the user's stored profile embedding.
shown_because: Ranked by vector similarity to the user's stored profile embedding.

explanation.note: Each recommendation item includes its own explanation object with source, score, pipeline, rules, experiments, and context.

error.message: Unauthorized: No client ID in JWT
